goal: Polish the battle entry flow and core battle UI into a unified red-gold theme without changing battle logic, card rules, or gameplay behavior.
constraints: Do not modify battleV2 gameplay logic, phase rules, or balance numbers.
Do not change card data, topics, or gameplay text beyond visual labeling needed for theme polish.
Limit edits to battle-facing presentation files and shared battle visual assets.
Keep existing navigation and screen flow intact.
deliverables: Battle setup, loading, topic selection, pre-faction loading, and main battle screens share a coherent red-gold visual language.
The main battle frame and top/bottom battle chrome feel more polished and less white/green.
Build passes after the UI-only changes.
